task_completion.description: Verify the contract name and associated account
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a contract named 'Annual Maintenance Agreement 2024' linked to the account 'Westfield Industrial Supplies' in the SuiteCRM interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the contract status is set correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Status field on the contract page and ensure it is set to 'Signed'.
Look for the Start Date field and ensure it is set to '07/01/2024' (or '2024-07-01' depending on date format settings).
Look for the End Date field and ensure it is set to '06/30/2025' (or '2025-06-30' depending on date format settings).
Look for the Total Contract Value field and ensure it displays '48000' or '48,000.00'.

Look at the Description field and ensure it contains the text: 'Annual preventive maintenance contract covering all industrial equipment at the Westfield facility. Includes quarterly inspections and emergency callout support.'

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the SuiteCRM web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the screenshots show a web browser navigating the SuiteCRM application, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the contract was actually saved
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Contract Detail view (read-only mode) or a 'Saved' confirmation message, indicating the form was submitted, rather than just left in the Edit view.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not spoof the result in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the data is entered into genuine SuiteCRM form fields or displayed in the SuiteCRM layout, not typed into a plain text editor or a generic document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Contract Name: 'Annual Maintenance Agreement 2024'. Expected Account: 'Westfield Industrial Supplies'. Expected Status: 'Signed'. Expected Start Date: '2024-07-01' (or 07/01/2024). Expected End Date: '2025-06-30' (or 06/30/2025). Expected Total Contract Value: 48000.00 (acceptable range 47900 to 48100). Expected Description: 'Annual preventive maintenance contract covering all industrial equipment at the Westfield facility. Includes quarterly inspections and emergency callout support.'
